title: Daily Rewards Fabric
description: Set up custom daily rewards, monthly rewards, and weekly rewards, and hourly/playtime rewards for players to claim. Fabric.
body:
Has: Daily rewards + Play time rewards!
Set up custom rewards for your members to receive every day.
Can assigned to an NPC or an entity via command!

Add an infinite amount of items in the config, for endless amounts of days. 
Supports enchanted items, different amounts of items, different names of the items, and more.

DOES NOTHING IF YOU DON'T ASSIGN IT TO AN ENTITY! Read commands below to see how to assign it to something.

# All commands:

/rewards-reload-daily-config

/rewards-reload-global-config

/rewards-reload-playerdata-config

/rewards-reload-playtime-config

/rewards-screen-entity add|remove <entity uuid> - Assign the menu to an entity so that when clicked, it'd open the GUI.

I can't maintain it, but will check out and merge/push/etc. requests to it on [Github](https://github.com/SmugTheKiler/daily-rewards-fabric).
